description: SPIKE: hermetic backstage parallel-line candidate generator. Runs `pi -p --no-tools` as a detached async actor. Separate process + zero tools + a fully self-contained prompt means it physically cannot read or write the GM's canonical state or secrets (it opens its own empty session; the parent state lives only in the parent process + parent session file). It returns a ParallelLineOutput JSON candidate on stdout; the main GM validates and lands it via record_offscreen_event, which settles the backstage obligation. This is a spike artifact — not active GM policy.
